programme.desc: Beidh an-spraoi ag Caitríona agus Roy agus iad ag imirt iománaíochta. (Caitríona and Roy are playing hurling today and it's great fun!)

programme.title: Elmo Anseo
programme.desc: Ag foghlaim faoi eolaithe a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about scientists today.)

programme.title: Elmo Anseo
programme.desc: Ag foghlaim faoi bheith ag tarraingt pictiúr a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo learns all about drawing today.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Déanann Pip agus Posy dearmad ar an méid a gheall siad do Jamila. (Pip and Posy forget a promise they made to Jamila.)

programme.title: Olobob Top
programme.desc: Tá clocha móra le feiceáil ar fud na foraoise. (Giant rocks appear all over the forest.)

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Ceapann Armadylan gur duine de na PJ Masks é ach an gceapann na laochra an rud céanna? (Armadylan thinks he's one of the PJ Masks.)

programme.title: Wussywat
programme.desc: Tagann Wussywat ar bhosca mór millteach sa ghairdín & tá sí ag iarraidh é a oscailt ach cinneann sé uirthi. (Wussywat finds a music box in the garden & wants to open it.)

programme.title: Clifford
programme.desc: Ligeann ár gcairde orthu féin gur muscaedóirí cróga iad. (The members of the "Birdwell Islandeers" realize they don't all agree on what it means to be a hero.)

programme.title: Woozle & Pip
programme.desc: Tá lá spóirt le bheith acu sa Ghairdín Draíochta inniu ach cé leis a mbeidh an lá? (It's sports day in the Magic Garden. Who will be the winner?)

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Tá Minty ag eitilt thart ar dhroim Bokchoydachtalach óg. (Minty soars over the valley on a baby Bokchoydactyl's back.)

programme.title: Dot
programme.desc: Tá Dot ag súil go mór lena col ceathrar Margot a fheiceáil. (Dot is super excited to reunite with her cousin Margot.)

programme.title: Ella Bella Bingo
programme.desc: Féachann Henry le túr a thógáil ach ní fhanfaidh sé ina sheasamh. (Henry wants to build a tower but the girls will not listen to his advice.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Scannán: Dinosaur Train: Adventure Islan
programme.desc: Nuair a bhrúchtann bolcán ar an Oileán Eachtraíochta téann na dineasáir óga amú. (When an earthquake erupts on a volcanic island the young ones are separated from their family.)

programme.title: Angelo Rules
programme.desc: Tá an leabhar ina bhfuil pleananna uile Angelo goidte ag Tracy. (Tracy steals the book Angelo has been keeping filled with his strategies.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Super Simple Amhráin
programme.desc: Amhrán spraíúil faoi rothaí an bhus a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about the wheels on the bus.)

programme.title: Blocuimhreacha
programme.desc: Imríonn sé déag cluiche cóisire. (Sixteen plays a party game.)

programme.title: Blocdhathanna
programme.desc: Bíonn spraoi ag na Clódóirí ag déanamh dathanna éagsúla. (The Printing Crew have lots of fun making different colours.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Réitíonn Posy agus Jamila deoch rúnda nuair a bhíonn siad féin agus a gcairde ag ligean orthu féin gur cailleacha iad. (Posy and Jamila concoct a secret potion.)

programme.title: Scoil Bheag Helen
programme.desc: Tá Helen ag iarraidh rialacha cluiche a mhíniú ach cuireann an Ridire Risteard isteach uirthi. (Helen is trying to explain the rules to a ball game.)

programme.title: Scoil Bheag Helen
programme.desc: Tugann Helen puzal do gach dalta le déanamh. (Helen decided to set each student a puzzle.)

programme.title: True agus Ríocht an Bhogha Ceatha
programme.desc: Glacann True an iomarca oibre uirthi féin agus téann éinín beag ar strae uirthi! (True commits to too many jobs today and as a result a little bird escapes!)

programme.title: Zou
programme.desc: Tugann Daideo & Daidí cúnamh do Zou pancóga a dhéanamh don díolachán cácaí ach ní éiríonn rómhaith leo. (Grandpa and Dad help Zou make pancakes for the school cake sale.)

programme.title: Ainmhithe Craiceáilte
programme.desc: Inniu feicfidh muid gadhar ag snámh, cearca cróga agus ulchabhán ag glaoch. (Today we'll see dogs who doggy paddle, chickens who play chicken, and owls who... who!)

programme.title: Timpeall na Tíre
programme.desc: Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Coinníonn Lois bronntanais na Nollag óna clann mhac chun smacht a choinneáil orthu. (Lois tries to get the boys to behave until Christmas by holding their presents hostage.)

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Ní bhíonn Sam ag iarraidh a insint do dhaoine faoi mar a caitheadh sa tóin é. (Sam makes up an elaborate story to explain how he got shot in the rear end.)

programme.title: Murder She Wrote
programme.desc: Tugann fear ait cuairt ar theach Jessica. An mhaidin chéanna tuairiscítear go bhfuil ilmhilliúnaí ar iarraidh. (Jessica has an odd encounter the same day a millionaire goes missing.)

programme.title: Steip 2025
programme.desc: Buaicphointí ó chomórtas Steip ag Oireachtas na Samhna 2025 i mBéal Feirste. (Highlights from the Steip competition at Oireachtas na Samhna 2025 in Belfast.)

programme.title: Scannán: Has Anybody Seen My Gal
programme.desc: Féachann fear lena chuid milliún a fhágáil ag muintir a chéad ghrá. An aging heir-less millionaire wants to leave his fortune to the unsuspecting family.

programme.title: Scoil Cheoil an Earraigh
programme.desc: Sraith ceoil thraidisiúnta nua ó fhéile Scoil Cheoil an Earraigh 2024 i gCorca Dhuibhne. (Pádraig Ó Sé brings us the best of music from Scoil Cheoil an Earraigh 2024.)

programme.title: An Aimsir Láithreach
programme.desc: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

programme.title: Scannán: Shrek
programme.desc: Díbríonn an Tiarna Farquaad gach a bhfuil sna scéalta sí isteach sa choill. (A mean lord exiles fairytale creatures to the swamp of a grumpy ogre.)

programme.title: An Aimsir Láithreach
programme.desc: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

programme.title: Nuacht TG4

programme.title: Abair Amhrán
programme.desc: Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)

programme.title: An Cósta Thiar
programme.desc: Is i gCarna a bheidh Áine an tseachtain seo. (Áine Ní Bhreisléain is in Carna as she explores the west coast and the communities that work there.)

programme.title: GAA 2026
programme.desc: Buaicphointí CLG an deireadh seachtaine, cluichí ceannais shraitheanna Allianz san áireamh. (Highlights of the weekend's best GAA action including the Allianz League finals.)

programme.title: Téacs Taistil
programme.desc: Tá Téacs Taistil ar ais! Tugann na taistealaithe aghaidh ar Toronto sa gclár seo. (Téacs Taistil is back! This week, the gang touch down in Toronto.)
